records.ety: [L. Jesus, Gr. <?/, from Heb. Yēshūa'; Yāh Jehovah + hōshīa' to help.]

defs: The Savior; the name of the Son of God as announced by the angel to his parents; the personal name of Our Lord, in distinction from Christ, his official appellation.
quotes: Thou shalt call his name Jesus; for he shall save his people from their sins.
Jesu, do thou my soul receive.
notes: ☞The form Jesu is often used, esp. in the vocative.
